commit.message:
fix: prevent DataStore.Save() deadlock on STA thread during startup seeding

Task.Run() pushes SaveAsync() to a threadpool thread, avoiding the classic
STA deadlock where .GetResult() blocks the main thread while the async
continuation tries to post back to it.

commit.message:
feat: implement GatherBlockQuantized operator (#673)

* feat: implement GatherBlockQuantized operator

Add support for the com.microsoft::GatherBlockQuantized contrib operator
which combines gather and block dequantization in a single operation.

Supports:
- Packed data (UINT8 containing 4-bit values) and native sub-byte types (INT4, UINT4)
- 4-bit and 8-bit quantization
- Optional zero_points (packed or unpacked)
- Configurable gather_axis and quantize_axis
- Default zero_point of 2^(bits-1) for unsigned data types

commit.message:
docs(petitions): add P053 - opskrivning/nedskrivning fuld G.A.-komplient spec

Petition 053 supersedes the rudimentary P034 with a complete legal
specification for fordringshaver write-up and write-down, grounded in
G.A.1.4.3, G.A.1.4.4, and gæld.bekendtg. § 7.

Key additions over P034:
- FR-1: Nedskrivning reason as controlled dropdown (3 G.A.1.4.4 grounds)
- FR-2: OPSKRIVNING_REGULERING blocked for RENTE-category claims;
        redirect to rentefordring (G.A.1.4.3, 3. pkt.)
- FR-3: Høring timing banner when claim is in HOERING state
        (gæld.bekendtg. § 7 stk. 1, 4. pkt.)
- FR-4: Retroactive nedskrivning advisory when virkningsdato < today
- FR-5: Annulleret nedskrivning backdating explanation (5. pkt.)
